gate_to_review: Gate H: devmasterd Local Control Plane Activation
evidence_that_need_exists: Gate G passed the local provider adapter kernel and authorized a devmasterd local control-plane activation proposal.
The product architecture requires CLI, Web, and IDE clients to route governed work through devmasterd instead of becoming separate orchestration systems.
The next 24/7 factory step needs a local queue/state/evidence API before Web Console, IDE extension, real providers, or external repo work can be safely introduced.

required_auth.applies_to: all daemon API endpoints, including localhost
required_auth.token_source: environment variable or explicit test fixture only

allowed_side_effects: repo-local provider evidence writes under runtime/devmasterd/provider-evidence/
repo-local evidence index writes under runtime/devmasterd/evidence-index.jsonl

review_focus: confirm localhost token auth is mandatory
confirm the daemon remains repo-local and stub-backed
confirm Web Console and IDE extension remain deferred protocol clients
confirm real provider calls and external repo mutation remain forbidden

new_risks.summary: A localhost daemon can become an unauthenticated control plane if early endpoints are left open.
new_risks.mitigation: all endpoints require a bearer token, and tests must verify unauthorized requests are rejected.

new_risks.summary: Queue/state/evidence writes can become inconsistent across requests.
new_risks.mitigation: use one local state store, append evidence records, and add round-trip tests for intake -> authorize -> run-provider.

new_risks.summary: The daemon could accidentally become the place where real providers are introduced early.
new_risks.mitigation: Phase 6 accepts only local fixtures/stub provider adapter output; real providers require a later activation decision.

new_risks.summary: Web Console or IDE extension work could begin before the daemon protocol is stable.
new_risks.mitigation: Phase 6 implements only the local daemon API and CLI runner; Web and IDE remain out of scope.

rollback_plan: disable Phase 6 by reverting Gate H to pending or fail
ignore devmasterd evidence emitted after rollback
keep provider adapter kernel evidence from Gate G as the fallback baseline
do not delete append-only evidence records

minimal_first_slice.goal: Implement a localhost-only devmasterd kernel with token auth, local queue/state/evidence APIs, and provider adapter stub integration.
required_checks: uv run ruff check runtime_engine bin tests
expected_artifacts: provider adapter stub run through daemon

acceptance_criteria_for_activation: Gate H review confirms token auth is required on localhost.
Gate H review confirms Phase 6 is limited to local daemon/control-plane implementation.
Gate H review confirms the daemon may call only the local provider adapter fixture path.
Gate H review confirms Web Console, IDE extension, real provider calls, and external repo mutation remain out of scope.
activation_exit_criteria: authorized intake creates a queued item in local state
authorized decision marks the item authorized without self-approval by a provider
authorized provider run writes provider evidence through the existing provider adapter kernel
daemon evidence index records the run without live external service calls
